description_long: This is a wooden fence panel composed of vertical planks with a rich brown finish, each plank featuring a series of small, diamond-shaped cutouts along its length. The front side displays evenly spaced planks with a flat top edge, while the back side reveals two horizontal support rails that reinforce the structure. The planks are closely aligned, providing privacy and a solid barrier, with subtle gaps between them. The wood grain texture is visible, giving the fence a natural and sturdy appearance suitable for urban or residential environments. The overall design is simple yet functional, with no ornate post caps or elaborate decorative elements. The fence is likely intended for use as a boundary or privacy screen in yards, parks, or along sidewalks.
description: A brown wooden fence panel with vertical planks, diamond-shaped cutouts, and two horizontal support rails on the back. The design is simple, sturdy, and provides privacy.
description_view_0: Front view showing vertical planks with diamond-shaped cutouts and a flat top edge.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin profile of the fence, with planks aligned closely together.
description_view_2: Back view revealing two horizontal support rails and the same vertical planks with cutouts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the narrow edge of the fence.
